Document:
# Protogen Frames
The foundation of a Protogen is their cybernetic frame, the thing that truly makes them distinct from their purely-biological brethren. Currently, there are 6 Protogen frames approved for usage by NanoTrasen and Central Command. They have been split up into Light, Medium, and Heavy.
## Light Frames
The Basic-Class light frame boasts the following specs. - Receive [color=#65807d]5% less slash damage[/color], [color=#b9bf93]5% less pierce damage[/color], and [color=#fcc203]5% explosion resistance[/color].
The Hermes-Class light frame boasts the following specs. - Receive [color=#65807d]15% more slash damage[/color] and [color=#b9bf93]15% more pierce damage[/color]. - Gain a [color=#03fce7]+5% sprint modifier[/color] and a [color=#03fce7]+5% walk modifier[/color].
## Medium Frames
The Basic-Class medium frame boasts the following specs. - Receive [color=#65807d]10% less slash damage[/color], [color=#FF3636]5% less blunt damage[/color], and [color=#b9bf93]5% less pierce damage[/color]. - Gain a [color=#fc0303]-5% sprint modifier[/color].
The Hecate-Class medium frame boasts the following specs. - Receive [color=#64ffe6]15% less poison damage[/color], [color=#bd5902]15% less radiation damage[/color], and [color=#C8FF75]15% less genetic damage[/color]. - Gain a small amount of biological resistance and some light cold insulation, in exchange for heating up more easily. - Gain a [color=#fc0303]-10% sprint modifier[/color]. - Give off a mild [color=#452e59]purple glow[/color].
## Heavy Frames
The Basic-Class heavy frame boasts the following specs. - Receive [color=#65807d]25% less slash damage[/color], [color=#b9bf93]10% less pierce damage[/color], and[color=#FF3636]15% less blunt damage[/color], and [color=#fcc203]25% explosion resistance[/color]. - Gain a [color=#fc0303]-25% sprint modifier[/color] and a [color=#fc0303]-15% walk modifier[/color].
The Nyx-Class heavy frame boasts the following specs. - Receive [color=#ffa500]10% less heat damage[/color], [color=#1e90ff]15% less cold damage[/color], and [color=#fcc203]25% explosion resistance[/color]. - Gain solid heat insulation, and moderate cold insulation. - Gain a [color=#fc0303]-15% sprint modifier[/color] and a [color=#fc0303]-10% walk modifier[/color]. - Gain the ability to move through open space without a space suit, provided you have something to cover your head and your own source of air.
